---
title: "James Batten Coulthard"
---

## James Batten Coulthard

**Dates:** (1818/19-1896)

### Description

relation of Frances (Walter) Yonge

### Biography

Described as of Binsted Hill, Alton, he was trustee of marriage settlement of Julian Bargus Yonge and Emma Frances Walter. A bachelor gentleman farmer,  he was probably brother of Mary Emma (Coulthard) Walter and uncle to Frances Yonge. [WDRO MS]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
